name: Asparagus with Mushrooms & Fresh Coriander
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim off the tough part of the asparagus stalk, about 2 to 3 inches from the bottom.
2. Using a vegetable peeler, scrape the asparagus to about 1 inch from the top. Cut the asparagus diagonally into 1-inch pieces.
3. Melt the butter in a non-stick frying pan over medium heat.
4. Add the mushrooms and cook until lightly browned, tossing occasionally.
5. Add the asparagus and cook for about 1 minute, stirring to combine with the mushrooms.
6. Add the shallots, salt, and pepper. Cook for an additional 30 seconds.
7. Sprinkle with fresh coriander before serving.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
